mapper.select: select er.*, s.name as studentName, s.student_no as studentNo, a.name as approverName from `exam_record` er left join `student` s on er.student_id = s.id left join `admin` a on er.approved_by = a.id where er.exam_id = #{examId} order by er.id desc

select er.*, e.name as examName, p.name as paperName, a.name as approverName from `exam_record` er left join `exam` e on er.exam_id = e.id left join `exam_paper` p on er.paper_id = p.id left join `admin` a on er.approved_by = a.id where er.student_id = #{studentId} order by er.id desc
mapper.insert:
insert into `exam_record`
id, exam_id, paper_id, student_id, start_time, submit_time, duration, status, auto_score, manual_score, total_score, is_pass, exam_status, approved_by, approved_at, is_published, published_at, switch_count, chief_examiner_id, chief_examiner_role, chief_examiner_name, final_decision_reason, final_evaluated_at,
#{id}, #{examId}, #{paperId}, #{studentId}, #{startTime}, #{submitTime}, #{duration}, #{status}, #{autoScore}, #{manualScore}, #{totalScore}, #{isPass}, #{examStatus}, #{approvedBy}, #{approvedAt}, #{isPublished}, #{publishedAt}, #{switchCount}, #{chiefExaminerId}, #{chiefExaminerRole}, #{chiefExaminerName}, #{finalDecisionReason}, #{finalEvaluatedAt},
mapper.update:
update `exam_record`
submit_time = #{submitTime},
duration = #{duration},
status = #{status},
auto_score = #{autoScore},
manual_score = #{manualScore},
total_score = #{totalScore},
is_pass = #{isPass},
exam_status = #{examStatus},
approved_by = #{approvedBy},
approved_at = #{approvedAt},
is_published = #{isPublished},
published_at = #{publishedAt},
switch_count = #{switchCount},
chief_examiner_id = #{chiefExaminerId},
chief_examiner_role = #{chiefExaminerRole},
chief_examiner_name = #{chiefExaminerName},
final_decision_reason = #{finalDecisionReason},
final_evaluated_at = #{finalEvaluatedAt},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select er.id, e.name as examName, s.name as studentName, er.total_score, er.is_pass, er.submit_time, er.published_at from `exam_record` er left join `exam` e on er.exam_id = e.id left join `student` s on er.student_id = s.id where er.is_published = 1 and er.status = 'completed' order by er.published_at desc limit 50

select s.id, s.name, s.branch, count(*) as reviewCount, round(avg(er.total_score), 1) as avgScore, sum(case when er.exam_status = 'PASSED' or er.is_pass = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as passCount, max(er.submit_time) as lastSubmitTime from `exam_record` er left join `student` s on er.student_id = s.id where er.status = 'completed' and er.total_score is not null and (er.is_published = 1 or er.exam_status = 'PASSED') group by s.id, s.name, s.branch order by passCount desc, avgScore desc, lastSubmitTime desc limit 30

select count(*) as total, sum(case when er.manual_score is not null then 1 else 0 end) as graded, sum(case when er.exam_status = 'PASSED' then 1 else 0 end) as approved from `exam_record` er where er.exam_id = #{examId} and er.status = 'completed'
